title: Onboarding dashboard with progress tracking and suggestions
purpose: Displays user's onboarding progress, category breakdowns, and personalized topic suggestions based on explored content.
module_context: Exports a React component that manages onboarding dashboard state and data fetching, including progress tracking and What's Next recommendations.

steps.content: Access onboarding context data including project, mode, and current user.
Set up state variables for topics, categories, progress, graph data, and loading status.
Redirect to onboarding browse page if not in onboard mode or user is not authenticated.
Fetch all required onboarding data including topics, categories, progress, and graph information.
Compute explored and skipped topic sets from progress data.
Generate progress percentage based on explored topics.
Calculate What's Next suggestions using graph data and explored topics.
Render dashboard UI with progress bar, suggestions, category cards, and topic list.

methods.name: computeWhatNext
methods.normalized_params: (graph: { nodes: GraphNode[]; edges: GraphEdge[] }, exploredTopics: Set<string>): WhatNextSuggestion[]

steps.content: Initialize a map to track topic scores based on graph connections.
For each edge in the graph, increment the score of connected topics if one is explored and the other is not.
IF no scores were generated (no topics explored), calculate connection counts for all unexplored topics.
Sort topics by their scores in descending order.
Take the top three topics as suggestions.
Format the suggestions with filePath, reason, and connection count.
